title: Scope Contract Audit Record
description: Normative audit record produced by a Scope Contract evaluation. Captures the full request, the response, the evaluation path, per-predicate evaluation trace, and reserved provenance for v0.2 cryptographic signing. Implementations MUST produce a conformant audit record for every evaluation. License: MIT (SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT). Part of AgentMarshal — github.com/ApexForge13/agentmarshal.

audit_record_version.description: Version of the audit record schema this record conforms to.

evaluation_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this single evaluation event. RECOMMENDED: UUIDv7.

tenant_id.description: Operator tenant namespace, echoed from the contract. REQUIRED in multi-tenant deployments.

agent_id.description: Agent identity from the contract being evaluated against.

contract_id.description: contract_id of the Scope Contract this evaluation was performed against.

contract_version.description: version field from the contract — preserves which version of a supersession chain was active.

evaluated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which evaluation was performed. MAY differ from logged_at if audit writes are deferred or batched.

request.description: The AuthZEN-shaped request that was evaluated. Echoed verbatim for reproducibility.

response.description: The AuthZEN-shaped response that was returned to the PEP. Echoed verbatim. Combined with 'request' this enables exact wire-level reproduction of the evaluation.

decision.description: Scope Contract-level decision. Maps to response.decision: allow→true; deny→false; escalate→false (with step-up context populated in response.context).

evaluation_path.description: Which evaluation phase produced the decision. 'temporal' indicates the contract was outside its validity window. 'out_of_scope' indicates a hard-deny match before declared_scope evaluation. 'declared_scope' indicates a rule match. 'no_match' indicates implicit DENY (no rule matched, action not in out_of_scope).

matched_rule_id.description: rule_id of the declared_scope rule that matched. REQUIRED when evaluation_path is 'declared_scope'; MUST be null otherwise.

out_of_scope_term.description: The out_of_scope entry that hard-denied the request. REQUIRED when evaluation_path is 'out_of_scope'; MUST be null otherwise.

reason_code.description: Stable machine-readable reason code. Populated from the matched rule's Decision.reason_code, or a synthesized code for non-rule paths (e.g., 'OUT_OF_SCOPE_HARD_DENY', 'NO_MATCH_IMPLICIT_DENY', 'CONTRACT_EXPIRED').

reason.description: Human-readable reason string. Surfaced in operator review UIs.

predicate_evaluations.description: Ordered trace of predicate evaluations performed. Useful for debugging false-negative matches and for compliance review. Implementations MUST include all predicates evaluated up to and including the decisive predicate; MAY include predicates that would have been evaluated had earlier ones passed.

escalation_ticket_id.description: Identifier of the escalation event triggered. REQUIRED when decision is 'escalate'; MUST be null otherwise.

output_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonicalized response (decision + context). Enables dedup detection and tamper-evidence. Format: 'sha256:<hex>'.

request_id.description: AuthZEN X-Request-ID correlation identifier echoed from the request, when present. Enables joining with PEP-side traces.

logged_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the audit record was persisted. MAY differ from evaluated_at if audit writes are deferred or batched.

provenance.description: Reserved for v0.2 cryptographic signing of audit records. MUST be null in v0.1. v0.2 will define a signature wrapper with issuer DID, signature algorithm, and signed canonical hash of the audit record contents.

extensions.description: Optional namespaced extensions matching the contract's extension namespaces (e.g., 'tt' for TextThread audit_log integration fields).

PredicateEvaluation.description: Per-predicate evaluation record. Captures the predicate path, the constraint applied, the actual value from the request, the pass/fail result, and an optional reason.

rule_id.description: rule_id within which this predicate was evaluated. Null when evaluation_path is 'out_of_scope' or 'temporal'.

predicate_path.description: Dot-path to the predicate within the match block (e.g., 'action.properties.amount', 'resource.properties.vendor_ref').

constraint.description: Verbatim copy of the predicate value from the contract at predicate_path. May be a literal or an operator object.

actual_value.description: The value from the request at predicate_path. May be null when the property is absent (relevant for 'exists: false' matches).

result.description: Whether this predicate passed or failed.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for fail/skipped results (e.g., 'amount exceeds max', 'currency mismatch', 'property absent').
